metadata.title: KEV-Exceptions Watchlist
metadata.description: Sentinel watchlist for managing approved KEV exceptions. The CISA KEV analytics rule left-anti-joins against this watchlist so matching CVE+device combos do not generate incidents. Each row requires justification, approver, and expiration date. Expired rows automatically re-alert.

properties.description: Governed exceptions for CISA KEV + MDVM correlation. Matching CVE+device pairs will NOT generate Sentinel incidents until ExpirationDate has passed. Set ExpirationDate far in the future for permanent risk acceptance (e.g., compensating control in place).
